calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Daniel Law, Esq. 310-758-1283 Prestige Legal Solutions for Plaintiff.
Kevin Kumar, Esq. 213-624-2500 Squire Patton Boggs LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Kumar presents arguments on group 2 and group 3, requests 60 days for production and reconsider sanctions. Mr. Daniel Law responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AJA WILLIAMS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AJA WILLIAMS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Continued to May 13, 2025, on the court's motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
